storyInfo: On an ordinary day, Kjerag is struck by a Catastrophe for the first time in history.

attributes.content: ...I believe you're wrong, sir.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Victoria may be the strongest nation on Terra, for now, but there is no guarantee that such prosperity will last forever.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: We are all familiar enough with the history of Victoria's four golden decades, nourished by the legacy of Gaul.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Times have changed, however. When Victoria's productivity advantages eroded, and her ambition to expand went unsated, the cracks of internal strife began to emerge beneath the surface.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: The last king attempted to mediate between the factories and the merchants, but failed to propose a new path out of the dilemma.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: His end was inevitable. The same was demonstrated by the coup in Leithanien not long after.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Who emerged as the victor of the bloody struggle? No... it has been more than a decade since they hanged the Lord of Lions, but the repercussions of the coup linger to this day.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: The Wheat of Brighton... the River Mersey Incident... have the dukes been able to set aside their conflicts for even a moment this past decade?
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Everyone believes they will emerge the better for the struggle. Not one believes they're digging Victoria's grave together.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: If we do not see change soon, an intensifying civil war will be what defines Victoria in this new era.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: I heard that a most eloquent young man stole the show today.
attributes.name: Powerful Old Woman

attributes.content: One would be forgiven for mistaking you for today's headliner.
attributes.name: Powerful Old Woman

attributes.content: I meant no offence, Your Grace, Duke of Caster.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: I had hoped to make the acquaintance of more people of wisdom at your manor, but I confess I find myself disappointed.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Do you consider yourself worthy of a position as a duke's advisor, or even the Speaker of Parliament, then?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Anyone can point out the ills that plague this nation. Curing it, however, calls for the proper means... a stroke of luck, even.
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: It seems that I am hardly the one who should be worrying about these things, though. What do you think?
attributes.name: Elegant Young Man

attributes.content: Heh...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I remember your mother... you have inherited none of her humility or courtesy, but all of her boldness and irreverence.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: ...Enciodes.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: You would hardly have found time for a distant relative from a distant land, if I had not caught your attention this way.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It was a rather inflammatory speech, but far from being enough to lay a foundation.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Many young lads have visited this house intending to make their names amongst the guests, so as to enjoy the adoration of others in high society.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: How do I know you are not one of them?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I have little interest in becoming a guest of honor at the banquets of Victorian nobility. I simply bring a modest proposal.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The resources of Kjerag and the industry of Caster complement each other perfectly. There is potential for equal cooperation.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am building Kjerag's first transnational trading company, and I would like to extend an invitation.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...Equal?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Equal.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In thirty years, the name Kjerag will lie on the lips of all the nations of Terra.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: We have nothing to lose, and everything to gain, from cooperation between our two lands.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I commend your courage.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: But I doubt you have the means to make such a promise, child.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: You will assent.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: As a consummate and visionary politician, you are well aware of the dilemma that Victoria faces... or should I say, the duchy of Caster faces.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You would not lightly dismiss any measure that could improve the situation, however slim the chance.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The fact that I stand before you now is proof enough that I'm worth investing in.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Be thankful you are young enough that I can forgive your impudence.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Answer me, then, young visionary, with your wit and guile.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: How does a country that has yet to adopt the Originium circuit plan on becoming a name on the lips of all the nations of Terra?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Your doubts are well-founded. Industry and technology are certainly important, but for a nation, there are other things that are even more important.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: To be frank, the particular nature of Victorian politics may have clouded your eyes to the potential of a united nation.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I believe—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.text: And She stood upon the highest peak, pointed to the lake in the distance, and spoke:
\n\n'Remember the path you walked, and let not yourself forget;
\n\nFear the blizzard that has yet to come, and let not yourself be arrogant;
\n\nClutch your bows and arrows, pickaxes and hoes tight, and let not yourself be careless;
\n\nLove your brothers and sisters; love your neighbors and friends, and love the rocks and hills, the grass and trees, as you would love your own siblings.
\n\nHeed these words, and no calamity shall befall you, and your home and hearth will be safe forever more.'

attributes.content: Saintess, it's almost time...
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Have the doctors not found a way?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: For years, the finest doctors of Kjerag and Victoria tried everything they could think of to purge the poison from the Great Elder.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: In the end, it is not illness that takes him, but time.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: I see...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: May I see him?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Of course...
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Please... deliver him in Kjeragandr's name.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Enya gently pushes the door open.
The dying man's chest barely moves as he lies on the bed. He seems to hear the sound and cocks his ear with great effort before opening his mouth meekly.
Enya... is that you?
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Great Elder...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: How are you feeling? Would you like some water?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Listen to me, Enya...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: What is your wish?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: This day... has been too long in coming...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Do you think that? This day has been too long in coming...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Of course not...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You taught me many things.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You have done well...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: But I was a poor teacher... a poor elder...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I was not even... a pious child of Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Great Elder?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I haven't heard Kjeragandr's voice... for many years...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I prayed day and night... recited the scriptures over and over... but She never answered my call.
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I was lost... I was afraid...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: But I had to keep going...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I thought... if Kjeragandr's will was to protect Her people... it was not against Her will to act in such a way...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I wanted to strengthen the Vine-Bead Court's authority... I wanted the hearts of Kjerag to be united and firm...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: But I erred... in many ways...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: 'One can lie to a man, but no one can deceive Kjeragandr.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She sees all that we do.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She knows all our errors, and our repentance.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I know... I believed...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: But a long time passed... and I thought that I had not been punished by Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: And so... I stopped believing.
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Until last night... Kjeragandr came to me in a dream.
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: She did not reproach me... She simply walked in front of me, leading me to the lake whose surface was like a mirror...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: And She said, 'All the rivers shall converge upon this place...'
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: And then I knew, my time was up...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I want to repent... I must repent... but it's too late for me...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Enya...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Tell me... honestly...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Do you still... hear Kjeragandr's voice?
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.text: Her followers must listen carefully to Her teachings at all times.
\n\nThe noise of the land may deafen our ears to Her voice, and the wind and snow blind our eyes to Her teachings.
\n\nBut remember always that She is good, and those who forsake Her walk on the wrong path.
\n\nIt is harder to be good than evil, to forgive than to hate, to be humble than to be proud.
\n\nThose who tread this path must know it is a treacherous one, but those who stray from it shall find it even harder to return.

attributes.content: Stop making all that noise, Yucatan.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Since when are you as restless as Sciurus?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I'm sorry, Matriarch... but I just can't help myself at a time like this...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: There's nothing I can do for her but pray.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Always so uneasy, you and Sciurus.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: She is my younger sister, and the future Browntail Matriarch. A little thing like this should be no trouble at all.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: That idiot's in excellent health. You remember how she sneaked out to climb Mount Jungfrau when she was eight, and ended up breaking her leg when she fell?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: They thought she'd never walk again. In two months, she was running and jumping around like nothing ever happened.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: No one gave it a second thought... are we really sure there were no lingering effects?
attributes.name: Ratatos
Ratatos
attributes.content: No, no, of course there wouldn't be...

attributes.name: Ratatos
attributes.content: It was so long ago, and the doctors say she's healthy as a burdenbeast...
But can those Victorian doctors really be trusted? I'll have their heads if anything happens to my stupid sister...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Gopferdammi... it's been four hours! Why haven't they come out yet?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Matriarch, report from Captain Monch—
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: Shut up! Don't bother me, whatever it is!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Understood...
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: L-Let's take a deep breath, Matriarch...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Kjeragandr will protect Rus...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: She's the gentlest woman I've ever met... who would Kjeragandr watch over, if not her?
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You're right... you're right...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: O Kjeragandr... hear my prayer...
I am hardly the most pious of Kjeragandr's people, but now I muster all my piety, in the hopes that Kjeragandr will grant this one favor.
If Clan Browntail must be punished for our past transgressions, then let all that punishment fall upon me.
I will accept your anger, your wrath.
But please... spare my foolish sister...
By Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Dear travelers, please note that train KT392 departing from Lake Silberneherze bound for Brig Pass will be delayed by one hour due to inclement weather.
Kjerag Rail sincerely apologizes for the inconvenience.
Please speak to a staff member at the information desk if you require assistance...
Are Victorian trains ever NOT late? Looks like they've rubbed off on Kjerag Rail.
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: It's just a little wait. Frankly, I'd rather stay here for a while longer than deal with those investors back home.
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: At least they have good cystymilk here for free... *burp*.
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: But inclement weather, they say? Doesn't look like it's snowing...
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: What's the hurry? The trains aren't running.
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: Sorry... excuse me...
attributes.name: Agitated Woman

attributes.content: Wait a minute...
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: I've seen this trick before! You're a pickpocket, aren't you?
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: Stop right there! Let me make sure you didn't steal anything...
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: The woman breaks free of the hand grabbing her shoulder and runs in the direction of the crowd, vanishing into a sea of people.
Huh! Hey! Somebody, help! Thief!
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: Did you lose something, ma'am?
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: My purse, jewelry, terminal... huh? Everything seems to be here?
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: But that one...
attributes.name: Impatient Tourist

attributes.content: Probably some unfortunate sod trying to get on without a ticket.
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: I told you, this is pious Kjerag, not postwar Londinium. No one's after your purse.
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: Does trying to ride without a ticket get you hunted down by warriors, in Kjerag?
attributes.name: Leisurely Tourist

attributes.content: Found you.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: Madam Carolin of Rhine Lab.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: I know who you are, and what you've done. Come quietly, unless you want everyone under the sun to know.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: The Vine-Bead Court will grant you a fair and impartial trial. First, give me what you're holding.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: The woman silently clutches the folder in her arms and thinks for a moment before crying out without warning.
Run!
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Run! There's a bomb in the station!
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: The crowded station quickly descends into chaos at the woman's cry.
The creator of the chaos once again disappears into the crowd.
Damn...
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: Rus... so glad you're alright...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: How are they... the children?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Perfectly fine. Your sister's taking care of them.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Rest now, and don't worry about a thing.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Yucatan... there were a few times there I thought I was going to see Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Every little bad thing that I ever did came flashing back before my eyes... even that time when I climbed that tree to steal fowlbeast eggs when I was eight...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: What would Kjeragandr punish me for...?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: She already punished you, remember? That time you spent two months in bed.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Don't worry about it, Rus... we've made it through so much. Now we've got another reason to keep going.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: We have to see Oak and Berry grow up.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Kjeragandr won't separate us...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Yucatan... is it snowing outside?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: It's a little cold...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I'll add some firewood and get you another blanket.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Sleep well, Rus.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: The winter will pass... and we can go see the flowers by the lake when spring comes. All of us, together.
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Sciurus closes her eyes and falls asleep quietly.
It should be a moment of happiness...
But Yucatan feels a rock in his heart.
He looks outside. The clouds are thick and heavy, but the snow refuses to fall. This kind of weather is rarely seen in Kjerag.
Maybe we're in for a cold winter this year, Yucatan thinks.
When the winter passes...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: 'She is omnipresent, She cannot be sought.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We need not question Her existence. She is there when we choose to follow Her.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...Do you remember this from the scriptures?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: No... this is not how it should be...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: If She is omnipresent and cannot be sought, then who hears Her will, and who—*cough* *cough*!!
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: You should rest, Great Elder. Don't let yourself suffer.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I see it, Enya...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I see unprecedented calamity descending upon Mount Karlan...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I see Originium bringing ruin to the land...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: I see... I see Her abandoning Kjerag!
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Caught up in a bout of excitement, the old man stares outside the window, his face warped and twisted, seemingly seething in anger, or engulfed by a terror that defies description.
He raises his withered arms, trying to grasp something, only for them to fall back down meekly.
Finally, he quiets down, as though he has expended the last sliver of strength he had...
Great Elder...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Say a prayer for me...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: The final chapter... of the Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.text: '...And all the rivers shall converge upon this place at the end of it all;
\n\nAnd you shall walk the path forward alone,
\n\nAnd the path you shall walk lies beneath your feet.'
\n\nShe sighs as She speaks the words.
\n\nShe turns around, and disappears in the wind and snow from whence she came.

attributes.content: You have no hope of escape. The people of Kjerag know the wind and snow better than any outsider. Your Arts are not effective here.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: We don't want to damage our relationship with Rhine Lab. Otherwise, I would keep you here by any means necessary to retrieve the military secrets that you stole.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: ...I'm not carrying your military secrets.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: I have no reason to believe you.
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: You don't understand.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Don't understand what?
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: You don't understand what these data mean...
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: How long do you think your 'god' will protect you?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: You can't talk your way out of this—
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: Wait...
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: What's with the clouds...?
attributes.name: Monch

attributes.content: Run—
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: The avalanche struck in an instant.
A loud crack moved the mountains that had remained dormant for many years. Snow poured down the slopes, mixed with rocks and black crystals, and all creation was obscured by gray and white.
The mountains trembled, the echoes lingered in the valley.
Few could comprehend what had just happened—
It was the first Catastrophe in history to strike this place.
